Selected Work

Products I've built

View All on GitHub →
● Live
Featured Project — 01

CryptoArena — Trading Education Platform

A freemium crypto trading simulator where users learn to trade 50+ cryptocurrencies using live market data — zero financial risk. Free users get a $10,000 virtual portfolio. Pro subscribers (₦2,000/month via Paystack) unlock $50,000, leaderboard access, and advanced trade analytics. Built with JWT auth, refresh token rotation, background cron jobs for price snapshots, and dual-wallet architecture.

Next.jsTypeScriptNode.jsExpressMongoDBPaystackRailwayVercel
▶ Live Demo { } Source
● Live
Project — 02

Pereyerin Edibles — Bakery E-Commerce

Production-ready Nigerian bakery platform with end-to-end Paystack payment processing, multi-role auth (customer, admin, sales rep), real-time inventory management, and a sales analytics dashboard. SSR optimised with dynamic imports and full mobile responsiveness.

Next.jsTypeScriptSupabasePaystackTailwind
▶ Live Demo { } Source
● Live
Project — 03

ThesisVault — Academic Submission Portal

Full-stack academic thesis management platform with multi-role access (student, supervisor, examiner, admin), real-time submission tracking, review workflows, and deadline management. PostgreSQL via Supabase with connection pooling on port 6543, deployed on Render.

Node.jsExpressPostgreSQLSupabaseRender
▶ Live Demo { } Source
● Live
Project — 04

Bookmarked — Book Club Platform

Full-stack book club management system with member application flow, curated reading library, and a protected admin dashboard for managing books, members, and applications. MongoDB Atlas with Mongoose, deployed on Render.

Node.jsExpressMongoDBEJSRender
▶ Live Demo { } Source
About Me

I build things end to end

I'm Obonin A. Justice, a full stack engineer based in Lagos, Nigeria. I specialise in building complete digital products — from the first database migration to the final pixel on screen.

My work spans payment-integrated e-commerce, academic portals, community platforms, and fintech simulators. I'm obsessed with the details that make software feel reliable and intuitive to use.

I approach every project with the same discipline: clear architecture, clean code, and shipping something that actually works in production — not just in development.

🏗️
Architecture-first Thinking
I design systems before writing code — schema design, API contracts, caching layers, and deployment strategy upfront.
💳
Payment & Fintech Experience
Production Paystack integrations across multiple projects including webhook verification, subscription billing, and payout flows.
🚀
Full Deployment Ownership
Every project I build is deployed live — Vercel, Render, Railway — with real environment configs, CORS, and CI via GitHub.
🔐
Auth Systems & Security
JWT access/refresh token rotation, bcrypt password hashing, role-based access control, and webhook signature verification.
